title: Fashion Retail Statistics 2026: Market Context for Healthcare Apparel
text: Broader apparel retail market context for FIGS showing monthly sales at clothing stores consistently exceeded $23 billion in 2025, indicating stable consumer demand. Apparel market size estimated at USD 1.84 trillion in 2025, expected to reach USD 2.54 trillion by 2033 at CAGR of 4.1%. Key consumer demand drivers: increasing demand for casual wear and athleisure, changing social media trends, higher disposable incomes, fast-growing e-commerce. Shoppers increasingly prioritize brand transparency in supply chains and eco-friendly materials with nearly 78% of US consumers stating sustainable lifestyle importance. E-commerce fastest-growing sales channel with projected 21.5% growth by 2026. Healthcare apparel segment benefits from professional identity positioning and premium quality attributes differentiating from commodity fashion.
